agent_fix_queue.task: never echo secrets; pass them directly to trusted binaries and keep shell tracing off
agent_fix_queue.why: workflow potentially leaks secrets via echo or debug output

agent_fix_queue.task: limit the path to build outputs and keep credential files out of caches and artifacts
agent_fix_queue.why: artifact or cache path includes secret material

agent_fix_queue.task: set an explicit timeout-minutes on each job
agent_fix_queue.why: workflow job is missing timeout-minutes

agent_fix_queue.task: pin every external action to a 40-character commit SHA
agent_fix_queue.why: workflow uses an external action not pinned to a full commit SHA

agent_fix_queue.task: add workflow-level concurrency with cancel-in-progress
agent_fix_queue.why: workflow is missing concurrency control

agent_fix_queue.task: pin the download, verify a checksum or signature, and avoid shell piping
agent_fix_queue.why: remote install step is not pinned or verified

agent_fix_queue.task: replace placeholders with implemented behavior, typed unsupported-state errors, or a tracked exception record with docs
agent_fix_queue.why: product code contains TODO/stub/unimplemented/unreachable placeholder markers

agent_fix_queue.task: replace unsafe sinks with typed schemas, parameterized APIs, allowlists, or sandboxed execution plus negative tests
agent_fix_queue.why: unsafe or unvalidated input boundary marker appears in product code

agent_fix_queue.task: add Storybook state coverage, Playwright screenshots, visual review or `@jankurai/ux-qa`, accessibility scans, CLS checks, generated mocks, and design tokens
agent_fix_queue.why: web surface lacks layered rendered UX QA evidence

agent_fix_queue.task: collapse fallback chains into explicit typed states with bounded retry policy, telemetry, and documented repair guidance
agent_fix_queue.why: fallback soup detected in product code

agent_fix_queue.task: extract the duplicated behavior behind one named boundary and add focused tests before changing behavior
agent_fix_queue.why: duplicated product code block detected
